query:
UPDATE businessLines SET keywords = JSON_ARRAY(
  "dewatering pump", "submersible pump", "wellpoint dewatering", "pump station", "water pump",
  "mine dewatering", "flood pump", "centrifugal pump", "drainage pump", "slurry pump",
  "water management", "pit dewatering", "water treatment", "wastewater", "sewage",
  "stormwater", "irrigation", "desalination", "water infrastructure", "water pipeline",
  "water supply", "dam", "reservoir", "flood mitigation", "flood protection", "tailings",
  "tailings dam", "process water", "recycled water", "pump", "pumping", "flow control",
  "valve", "pipe", "TasWater", "SA Water", "Sydney Water", "Melbourne Water", "Water Corporation",
  "Sykes", "Sykes Group", "Sykes pump", "Sykes dewatering",
  "high head pump", "medium head pump", "low head pump", "extra high head pump",
  "acoustic pump", "sewage pump", "waste pump", "contractor pump",
  "HH80", "HH135", "HH160i", "HH220i", "HH300",
  "MH150", "MH220", "MH300", "MH450",
  "XH100", "XH150", "XH200", "XH250", "XH300",
  "CP80i", "CP100i", "CP150i", "CP150iC", "CP220i", "CP250i", "CP300i", "CP310",
  "SW100", "SW150", "SW250", "SW310",
  "Yakka V2", "Yakka V2 150", "Yakka V2 100", "Yakka V2 HH80", "Yakka V2 SW100",
  "automatic priming pump", "self-priming pump", "solids handling pump",
  "mine water", "construction dewatering", "sewer bypass", "flood recovery",
  "water recycling", "water treatment plant", "pump hire", "pump rental",
  "dewatering solution", "water management solution", "portable pump",
  "diesel pump", "engine driven pump", "trailer mounted pump"
), equipmentTypes = JSON_ARRAY(
  "Dewatering Pump", "Submersible Pump", "Wellpoint System", "Centrifugal Pump",
  "High Head Pump", "Medium Head Pump", "Low Head Pump", "Extra High Head Pump",
  "Acoustic Pump", "Sewage Pump", "Contractor Pump", "Yakka V2 Pump"
), updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 30001;
